title: The War Spreads from the Live Floor to the Roof
description: On pages 31–34, this part focuses on Unknown person #29, Unknown person #30, Unknown person #31, Unknown person #32 as The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
scene: The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: I have a little brother...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: who ate a devil fruit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't tell me that what we just ate was....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: It seems like...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: "Fire" ability

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: It's more suited for combat than rubber

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are you so non- chalant about it!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like only the person that takes the first bite gains the power,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But still, finish it all! Don't be waste- full!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: This will surprise to Lifey

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: We might be able to escape...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we can utilise this newfound power...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: We'll escape "This ambition"...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can structure our ship like a paddle steamer.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: three paddle wheels, two on the sides and one on the back.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: and to power it,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll make use of your devil fruit, ace!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'll have to spin the paddles by generating just the right amount of flames.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So all I need to do is keep my flames under control in order to spin the paddles fast with- out destroying them, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Got- cha!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, exactly... but what the hell are you doing?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: That giant bird

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Still has the nerve to come back here...

summary: This section advances the Wano - The War Spreads Across Onigashima storyline with 23 dialogue beats. The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
